title: Section 57
content: 1[57. Licensing of public warehouses.--The Principal Commissioner of Customs or Commissioner of Customs may, subject to such conditions as may be prescribed, licence a public warehouse wherein dutiable goods may be deposited.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 28 of 2016, s. 124, for section 57 (w.e.f. 14-5-2016).
